3305560.name: SCP Desktop Pals Pack
3305560.description:
The SCP Desktop Pals Pack is finally here! This DLC grants you access to the SCP pal collection, along with the SCP UI theme.

The pack includes the following pals:

  • SCP-999 (Tickle Monster)

  • SCP-173 (Peanut)

  • SCP-131 (Eye Pods)

  • SCP-049 (Plague Doctor)

  • SCP-939 (The Dog)

This pack includes the following UI themes:

  • SCP UI Theme

This work is based on content from the SCP Foundation (scpwiki) and is licensed under CC BY-SA 3.0. Original authors retain their rights. This DLC content also falls under this license and I encourage community members to reuse and adapt them. To make this process easier, our discord provides a public folder link to all of this DLC content. Credit and my personal thank you to the SCP authors; ProfSnider, Moto42, Lt Masipag, Gabriel Jade & djkaktus, Adam Smascher & EchoFourDelta. Art by @keelysari4 and @osteo_blib.
